programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. programme.desc: Let's learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. programme.title: E2 - When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Get ready to laugh as everything goes hilariously wrong for Kii & Yii & their friends! The chaos starts when Robot creates a jelly-making machine, but it goes haywire & he ends up stuck inside a giant wobbly jelly! Then, Princess Cat puts way too much soap in her washing machine, causing it to overflow & fill her entire castle with bubbles! From a wobbly tooth to a picky eater, it's one funny problem after another!

programme.title: E3 - How Does JJ Like to Play?
programme.desc: Find out all the fun ways JJ likes to play! First, join JJ, TomTom & YoYo as they spend the day indoors pretending to be doctors & nurses. Then, the fun continues outside! When the kids get restless at a family barbecue, they play a fun game of 'Simon Says.' On another adventure, experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo take JJ under their wing & show him how to do classic outdoor camping activities. From racing grocery carts to a doggy playdate, JJ loves to play!

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E1 - Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster is learning that teamwork makes the dream work! During a big soccer match, Buster is very competitive, but he learns the value of being a team player to help his team win the game. Then, when he & his friend Scout get lost in a big hedge maze, they find that they have to work together to find their way out. From cleaning up toys to helping a friend who is stuck in the mud, teamwork always saves the day!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E4 - Fun Facts About The World!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning fun facts all about the world! He & D.BO shrink down to meet Ernie the Eraser, an aspiring magician who teaches them the science behind how erasers work. Then, they fly into the night sky to learn how fireworks get their colors & why some animals, like raccoons, prefer to come out at night. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how to be a cowboy in the desert & helps a brave spoon protect his cereal from getting soggy!

programme.title: E3 - Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Join Blippi on an adventure to the wonders of our world & beyond! First, he travels to the tallest mountain on Earth, Mt. Everest, with his new friend Betty the Yeti. Then, he dives deep into the ocean to explore a kelp forest with Jerry the Jellyfish. The adventure gets explosive as Blippi & FETCH fly into a volcano! After exploring the Earth, Blippi blasts off into space to tour the solar system, learn about gravity on the moon & discover how rainbows get their amazing colors!

programme.title: E1 - Taking on the Baddest Baddies in Town!
programme.desc: It's up to Mila & Morphle to take on the baddest baddies in town! The trouble begins when the Bandits use robot versions of Mila & Morphle to cause chaos. Then, the friends discover a Mirror World where they meet Orphle, Morphle's naughty reflection. When Orphle escapes & causes trouble, they have to stop him! The action continues as the Bandits use a zapper to turn animals into giants & team up with Orphle to escape from jail!

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E1 - Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster is learning that teamwork makes the dream work! During a big soccer match, Buster is very competitive, but he learns the value of being a team player to help his team win the game. Then, when he & his friend Scout get lost in a big hedge maze, they find that they have to work together to find their way out. From cleaning up toys to helping a friend who is stuck in the mud, teamwork always saves the day!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match

programme.title: E1 - Taking on the Baddest Baddies in Town!
programme.desc: It's up to Mila & Morphle to take on the baddest baddies in town! The trouble begins when the Bandits use robot versions of Mila & Morphle to cause chaos. Then, the friends discover a Mirror World where they meet Orphle, Morphle's naughty reflection. When Orphle escapes & causes trouble, they have to stop him! The action continues as the Bandits use a zapper to turn animals into giants & team up with Orphle to escape from jail!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E53
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E53
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E14

programme.title: Legion
programme.desc: When God loses faith in mankind he sends his Legion of angels to wipe out the human race for the second time. Man's only hope lies in a group of misfits holed up in a desert diner. With the help of the Archangel Michael, these strangers must deliver a baby they soon realize is the second coming and their last chance at redemption.

programme.title: Ye Hai Mohabbatein

programme.title: E2 - Rob Brydon
programme.desc: Funny man Rob Brydon joins Bear Grylls for an adventure he won’t forget as he takes on a mission in the Mountains of Snowdonia.

programme.title: E1 - Highlight 1
programme.desc: A 44-ton Artic straddling the central reservation of the M1 is a rush hour headache for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve and one of the youngest Recovery Ops on the team, Pat. Down South, Lantern Recovery op Steve rescues a broken down 26-ton dustcart from a busy London street. Crouch Recovery op Jim gets drenched as he risks life and limb trying to get a broken-down tractor back to its farm – just a hundred yards away! And Lantern’s night shift recovery op Jason faces a battle to rescue an articulated lorry that’s crashed down a steep ditch off the A1.

programme.title: E2 - Highlight 2
programme.desc: An overturned Gas tanker full of highly flammable propane mean trouble for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve. Working with the fire service he must all his experience to keep his team out of danger. Meanwhile with very little room to manoeuvre Lantern recovery op Steve must rescue a 44-ton artic stuck in a ditch on a busy five lane roundabout. And Lantern Recovery Op Sean has thought on his feet to break into an abandoned truck!

programme.title: E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: E7 - Chinese Mystery Snails
programme.desc: In the crystal clear lakes of Northern Wisconsin lurks a peculiar creature... the Chinese Mystery Snail which gets its namesake from female snails giving birth to young, fully developed snails that suddenly and 'mysteriously' appear. Utilized for its high protein, low fat content in China, the mystery snail is a food source believed to aid in treatment of digestive disease. Eager to explore this feral snail as a food source, Yia travels to Clear Lake to meet up with Wisconsin Fisheries Specialist Titus Seilheimer, who's seen first hand the explosion of these snails at his family's lakefront resort.

programme.title: E4 - This Roux's for You
programme.desc: After a late night of good times, venison chili, and some old school roux the crew heads out for another day of hunting ducks. Adaptability is critical, and after a couple of quick adjustments the team finds themselves back in the ducks.

programme.title: E1 - Anthony Joshua
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls teaches the unified world heavyweight champion some alternative survival skills.

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E7 - Brook Trout & Milkweed Flowers
programme.desc: Daniel navigates the rugged terrain of mountain stream beds to fish wild brook trout and forage milkweed flowers for a camp meal hard won from the wild.

programme.title: E7 - Chinese Mystery Snails
programme.desc: In the crystal clear lakes of Northern Wisconsin lurks a peculiar creature... the Chinese Mystery Snail which gets its namesake from female snails giving birth to young, fully developed snails that suddenly and 'mysteriously' appear. Eager to explore this feral snail as a food source, Yia travels to Clear Lake to meet up with Wisconsin Fisheries Specialist Titus Seilheimer, who's seen first hand the explosion of these snails at his family's lakefront resort.

programme.desc: Funny man Rob Brydon joins Bear Grylls for an adventure he won’t forget as he takes on a mission in the Mountains of Snowdonia.

programme.title: E4 - This Roux's for You
programme.desc: After a late night of good times, venison chili, and some old school roux the crew heads out for another day of hunting ducks. Adaptability is critical, and after a couple of quick adjustments the team finds themselves back in the ducks.

programme.title: E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: E1 - Highlight 1
programme.desc: A 44-ton Artic straddling the central reservation of the M1 is a rush hour headache for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve and one of the youngest Recovery Ops on the team, Pat. Down South, Lantern Recovery op Steve rescues a broken down 26-ton dustcart from a busy London street. Crouch Recovery op Jim gets drenched as he risks life and limb trying to get a broken-down tractor back to its farm – just a hundred yards away! And Lantern’s night shift recovery op Jason faces a battle to rescue an articulated lorry that’s crashed down a steep ditch off the A1.

programme.title: E2 - Highlight 2
programme.desc: An overturned Gas tanker full of highly flammable propane mean trouble for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve. Working with the fire service he must all his experience to keep his team out of danger. Meanwhile with very little room to manoeuvre Lantern recovery op Steve must rescue a 44-ton artic stuck in a ditch on a busy five lane roundabout. And Lantern Recovery Op Sean has thought on his feet to break into an abandoned truck!

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 惠州有粵東門戶之稱, 自然資源豐富, 擁有迷人海灣, 亦是移居城市, 近年吸引不少港人在當地買樓, 節目【樂活大灣區】, 帶大家了解惠州新發展, 融入大灣區一小時生活圈。

programme.title: E15 - Good Mitch Spiking/Stilt Walkers
programme.desc: Muscle Man reveals his secret past.

programme.title: E1319 - Feed Me/Crab Shenanigans/Brobots/Brain Flip/Beast Boy On A Shelf
programme.desc: The Titans release a small marshmallow ducky that the Easter Bunny had locked up, not knowing the danger they have unleashed.

programme.title: E16 - My Clique/Emergency/Cupcake Job/Panda's Sneeze/Brother Up
programme.desc: Chloe, a child prodigy, finds it difficult to connect with her much older classmates. The Bears take her under their wing, showing her how to make great college friends.

programme.title: E105 - Take 10/This One Goes To 11/Omni-Copped/I Don't Like You/Rustbucket RIP
programme.desc: While trying to film his own indie film, Ben accidentally allows the Bug Gang to go free and when he takes the fight to their hidden lair, Ben has to take on their narcissistic leader - the Ant Queen.

programme.title: E252 - Wind Some, Lose Some/The Feels/Past Aliens Present/Dreamtime/Digital Quality
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Grandpa Max find the Weatherheads using the towering turbines for their latest nefarious plan.

programme.title: E363 - Bookfair/Unpractical Cabin/The Bear, The Frog And The Mosquito/Musical Battle/Day And
programme.desc: Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over a giant jelly cake. Their chase leads them to the castle library, where the Lemmings accidentally activate the opening of a secret passage.

programme.title: E26 - Taxi Bean/Muscle Bean/A New Friend/The Lift/Dig This
programme.desc: Mr Bean becomes a taxi driver after being locked in a taxi.

programme.title: E103 - The Distance/The Thing
programme.desc: Gumball must find a way to save his relationship with Darwin after the boys are forced to live in separate rooms.

E22
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E2 - 《火力全開》舞台燃炸
programme.desc: 集結25位跨領域青春藝人，組建國內首個全明星流行表演合唱團「燃青團」；跳出傳統音樂真人秀的固化框架，不爭C位、不設淘汰，更關注合唱聲部，以團魂養成、情緒共振為核心，帶來全新觀看體驗；全景式記錄一群年輕人從陌生疏離到默契共生，從個體閃耀到集體綻放的熱血蛻變歷程。

programme.title: E2 - 《火力全開》舞台燃炸

programme.title: E14 - 「自律先生」受青睞
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: Le Monde Apres Nous
programme.desc: In Paris, Labidi shares a small single-room apartment and survives thanks to scamming and part-time jobs. He dreams of being a writer, but when he meets Elisa he is forced to reconsider his lifestyle.

programme.title: E3 - The Flooded Mines Of Bell Island
programme.desc: Sam and Mario head off to explore a veritable underground museum as they explore the mines of Bell Island, worked for their iron or until 1966.

programme.title: Ardennes, Toute Ame A Ses Petits Secrets
programme.desc: Enigmatic psychiatrist Olivier Rimbaud lives in an isolated manor in Champagne-Ardenne. In addition to taking care of his patients, he does profiling to help the police with the most complex cases. As he sets out on the trail of a serial killer, his own secrets catch up with him.

programme.title: 64' Actu:2025-2026
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat:2025-2026
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: E12 - Maison Des Canuts/Sarah Valente/Thibaut Thierry
programme.desc: The Maison des Canuts traces the long tradition of Lyon's gold, silver and silk weavers. Each creation by visual artist Sarah Valente sounds like a call from the forest. Zomer is turning fashion upside down. In Brittany, craftsman Thibaut Thierry works paper with seaweed.

programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: E62 - Plaster Of Paris
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: E23 - Musee Camille Claudel/Pierre-Emmanuel Lyet/Kidsuper/Atelier Baque Molinie
programme.desc: The Camille Claudel Museum includes works by artists from Nogent. Notebooks, coloured pencils and an overflowing imagination - that's the recipe of illustrator Pierre-Emmanuel Lyet. The models in the Kidsuper catwalk show live in a limitless imaginary world. Laetitia Baque and Victor Molinie are redrawing the contours of contemporary embroidery.

programme.title: E128
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E10 - Velvet In The Voice/The Ajoie Bistro
programme.desc: A portrait of Cyrielle Formaz, aka Meimuna, a talented Valaisan singer, followed by an immersive visit to Les Deux Clefs brewery in Porrentruy.

programme.title: E35 - A Visit To Capbreton
programme.desc: Discovering Capbreton. Meetings with fishermen, divers, and local enthusiasts; a focus on the history of the pier and the mystery of the marine abyss, followed by a local ceviche recipe.

programme.title: E15 - The Ramparts De Carcassonne With Franck Putelat
programme.desc: In the heart of Cathar country, we meet Franck Putelat, a Michelin-star chef, Meilleur Ouvrier de France and Bocuse d'Argent winner. A perfect opportunity to take an astonishing gourmet tour from unfathomable chasms to perched castles, to discover a generous region, endearing people and producers committed to passing on local traditions.

programme.title: E12 - Maison Des Canuts/Sarah Valente/Thibaut Thierry
programme.desc: The Maison des Canuts traces the long tradition of Lyon's gold, silver and silk weavers. Each creation by visual artist Sarah Valente sounds like a call from the forest. Zomer is turning fashion upside down. In Brittany, craftsman Thibaut Thierry works paper with seaweed.

programme.desc: In an attempt to return to his role as a father and to help Carolina recover from her illness, Andrea starts to pursue Agnese again. Elisa and Riccardo have to deal with an aspiring astronaut and Gabriel with a bad headache.

programme.desc: When a babysitting client says, 'You're my favorite babysitter ever', Sam and Cat debate which one of them he meant. They compete for their new clients' affection to see who really is the best babysitter.

programme.title: E205 - The Other Mutanimals
programme.desc: Desperate to save Wingnut from Tokka, Rahzar, & the Monster Mutanimals, Donnie delves deeper into the lab of a mad scientist. Meanwhile, his brothers follow another Tokka to the Staten Island lab... only for things to take a disastrous turn!

programme.title: E111 - Best Fwends / The Trivialist Pursuit
programme.desc: Bester's new pet comes between her and her brother. There's nothing to it, Best must splat the cockroach! // Best and Bester go on an epic quest for a talking whale to prove they answered a board game question correctly.

programme.title: E209 - The Girl Who Cried Danger
programme.desc: Volt and ShoutOut hatch a plan to stop their super-clinger fan from making false alarm emergency calls.

programme.title: E285 - Delivery to Monster Island / Ride Patrick Ride
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Plankton must work together to survive an island of deadly monsters. // SpongeBob teaches Patrick how to ride a bike.

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E105 - Save the Date
programme.desc: Max bets Phoebe she can't turn off being a superhero and go on a normal date. Chloe helps Phoebe do well on the date, but Max tries to sabotage it by crying wolf. Suddenly, a real supervillain emerges and puts Max and Chloe in serious danger.

programme.title: E105 - Meats of Strength / Dead Ed's
programme.desc: Jack's new friend Beef invites him to a sleepover. Jack, a sleepover newb, freaks out over impressing his new friend. // Jack & Lil try to prove they're the one true local, enduring a series of bizarre quests in the local dive restaurant Dead Ed's.

Better Travel With Ai & Apps?
programme.desc: From AI travel bots to smart city systems, technology promises smoother journeys and better crowd management. But concerns grow over transparency, exclusion, and the risk that everyone follows the same tips.

programme.title: Better Travel With Ai & Apps?

programme.title: Breakthrough Innovation Made In Germany: How Sprin-D Turns Ideas Into Marke
programme.desc: Germany excels at invention but often fails to scale it. The SPRIN-D agency aims to speed up the path from research to market-ready technologies.

programme.title: San Michele - Venice's Cemetery Island
programme.desc: Venice is a city unlike any other, so it's no surprise its cemetery is also unique. Located halfway between the city of Venice and the glassblowing island of Murano, Venetians find their final resting place on the cemetery island of San Michele.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: This horror romantic-comedy drama is about the mysterious things that happen when a drama writer who sees ghosts meets a top star who plays the main character of her script.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unraveling a pink-hued mystery as they search for ‘M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.desc: When a robbery at a community clinic turns deadly, the team investigates a drug trafficking crew and soon uncovers that the clinic's doctor may be more involved than they initially thought.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: E32
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Pierce
programme.desc: Young fencer Zijie finds his world upended when his older brother, three-time national fencing champion Zihan, is released from juvenile prison. Zihan was incarcerated for what he maintains was the accidental death of an opponent. Zijie wants some connection (and fencing tips) from his enigmatic older brother, but their mother is convinced of Zihan's malevolence and seeks to end their brotherly bond. Featuring meticulously staged fencing matches and pitch-perfect performances, this unnerving psychodrama announces Nelicia Low as a future talent to follow.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: She’s Got No Name
programme.desc: Set in a bustling alleyway during the Japanese occupation of Shanghai in the 1940s, the film centres on a wife, Zhan Zhou, who was being charged with the bloody dismemberment of her husband – a killing that seems impossible for her to have committed alone. The murder thrusts Zhan into the spotlight and the court of public opinion, forcing her towards a fate intertwined with that of her own country.

programme.title: E58
programme.desc: Aparajita, a talented artist haunted by her past, crosses paths with Rakshit, a reserved businessman. Though he avoids romance, their unexpected connection might just lead to true love.

programme.title: E3 - Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Contend with the challenges of the rainy season, which turns everything green and spoils the lions’ camouflage. Watch Einstein fail to make new connections and weigh the pros and cons when Keeza and her cub are kidnapped by rival male Mad-Eye Moody.

programme.title: E6 - Goodbye Campers
programme.desc: Prepare for the summer cubs’ release with Roger, then meet Ace and Little Blueberry, two newbies with serious health issues who will have to stay over the winter with the Z cubs. Later, celebrate as six healthy, happy bears embark on their new life.

programme.title: E3 - Island Feast
programme.desc: Off the coast of Oman, summer weather drives nutrients in from the ocean depths where they meet the Arabian sun, causing an explosion of life. Smaller fish spawn, filling the waters with eggs. This creates a buffet predators just can’t resist.

programme.title: E4 - Defenders of the Reef
programme.desc: It’s summer in the Gulf of Oman. The scorching Arabian sun heats the shallow waters to 86 degrees boosting the growth of algae across a vast coral reef. This attracts thousands of hungry herbivores creating a fish versus fish turf war.

programme.title: E2 - Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: The Nsefu lion pride welcomes seven new cubs during the wet season, when antelope and buffalo are spread far from the river, making them harder to hunt. Learn how the mother lionesses work to keep the boisterous cubs alive.

programme.title: E3 - Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Contend with the challenges of the rainy season, which turns everything green and spoils the lions’ camouflage. Watch Einstein fail to make new connections and weigh the pros and cons when Keeza and her cub are kidnapped by rival male Mad-Eye Moody.

programme.title: E3 - Island Feast

programme.title: E4 - Defenders of the Reef
programme.desc: It’s summer in the Gulf of Oman. The scorching Arabian sun heats the shallow waters to 86 degrees boosting the growth of algae across a vast coral reef. This attracts thousands of hungry herbivores creating a fish versus fish turf war.

programme.title: E3 - The Gates of Hell
programme.desc: Italy's Mount Etna is one of the best places for volcano watchers and volcanologist Tom Pfeffier is hoping to get lucky and see a paroxysmal eruption, a short and very intense eruption that produces spectacular lava fountains.

programme.title: E3 - Island Feast
programme.desc: Off the coast of Oman, summer weather drives nutrients in from the ocean depths where they meet the Arabian sun, causing an explosion of life. Smaller fish spawn, filling the waters with eggs. This creates a buffet predators just can’t resist.

programme.title: E4 - Defenders of the Reef

programme.title: E1 - Baby Sea Otter Finds a Family
programme.desc: Join the vet and his team in saving a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose, and then visit the Rescue Center, where a harbor seal pup may lose its eyesight and a baby sea otter needs a risky but life-saving surgery.

programme.title: E5 - September-October - a Time of Activation
programme.desc: Travel around the world to see another seasonal change unfold. The Northern Hemisphere moves into autumn, while Australia witnesses a rebirth of life, and mating humpbacks fill the warming tropical seas of Tonga.

programme.title: E6 - November-December - Full Circle
programme.desc: Witness some of the most incredible natural events in November, from the millions of Monarch butterflies that converge in Mexico’s forests to the deep fog that shrouds the city of Dubai, signalling the start of winter.

programme.title: E3 - Kings of Nsefu
programme.desc: Twin brothers with a powerful bond have ruled the Nsefu pride for three years. They’re fathers to all the young, and protectors of their territory. Witness the struggle that unfolds when rival males target their territory.

programme.title: E2 - Bird Paradise
programme.desc: Every year, the southern wetlands of the Pantanal become a bird paradise as over 650 species of rare and iconic birds congregate here for the breeding season.

programme.title: E3 - Island Feast
programme.desc: Off the coast of Oman, summer weather drives nutrients in from the ocean depths where they meet the Arabian sun, causing an explosion of life. Smaller fish spawn, filling the waters with eggs. This creates a buffet predators just can’t resist.

programme.title: E4 - Defenders of the Reef
programme.desc: It’s summer in the Gulf of Oman. The scorching Arabian sun heats the shallow waters to 86 degrees boosting the growth of algae across a vast coral reef. This attracts thousands of hungry herbivores creating a fish versus fish turf war.

programme.title: E5 - September-October - a Time of Activation
programme.desc: Travel around the world to see another seasonal change unfold. The Northern Hemisphere moves into autumn, while Australia witnesses a rebirth of life, and mating humpbacks fill the warming tropical seas of Tonga.

programme.title: E6 - November-December - Full Circle
programme.desc: Witness some of the most incredible natural events in November, from the millions of Monarch butterflies that converge in Mexico’s forests to the deep fog that shrouds the city of Dubai, signalling the start of winter.

programme.title: E3 - Kings of Nsefu
programme.desc: Twin brothers with a powerful bond have ruled the Nsefu pride for three years. They’re fathers to all the young, and protectors of their territory. Witness the struggle that unfolds when rival males target their territory.
